_default: **WebGPU renderer** (`renderer: 'webgpu'`) requires an extended bundle entry and is experimental — use WebGL (default) for production.
**SVG export** (`exportSVG()`) is unavailable on core-only imports and partial elsewhere; see [Stage 6 SVG parity](/roadmap/06-svg-vector-parity).
See [Plugin status registry](/PLUGIN-STATUS) for plugin maturity (`complete`, `partial`, `experimental`).
api/core-bundle.md: Extended series (`candlestick`, `bar`, `heatmap`, …) throw at runtime — import `velo-plot/trading`, `/scientific`, or `/full`.
Trading chart methods (`addIndicator`, alerts, …) throw — import `velo-plot/trading` or `/full`.
`exportSVG()` throws — use `exportImage()` or an extended entry.
Measured core gzip ~51 KB (CI budget 52 KB).
api/scientific-bundle.md: Trading-only APIs (`addIndicator`, alerts, drawings) are not included — use `velo-plot/trading` or `/full` for those.
Import side-effects register extended series — always import from `velo-plot/scientific`, not deep paths.
api/chart.md: Series types and `renderer: 'webgpu'` depend on bundle entry — see [Bundle Architecture](/guide/bundle-architecture).
Polar, gauge, and sankey series render on the Canvas 2D path when WebGPU is selected — they fall back to WebGL/Canvas automatically.
Default `loading` is off in v3 core — pass `loading: true` for the init overlay.
api/stacked-chart.md: **SVG stack export** is not yet available — use PNG/JPEG/WebP via `exportImage()`.
**Legend DOM** is not included in stack export.
**Horizontal layout** sync defaults to Y-axis; override with `sync: { axis: 'x' }` if needed.
Requires `velo-plot/trading` or `/full` for stacked + indicator APIs.
api/chart-sync.md: **Selection sync** propagates by series id and point indices — series ids must match across charts.
api/trading-bundle.md: Tree-shaken `velo-plot/trading` excludes 3D and heavy scientific plugins; import `velo-plot/scientific` or `velo-plot/full` when needed.
Registration runs on entry import — do not deep-import internal modules without the trading entry.
Measured minified gzip ~72 KB (CI budget 150 KB) — see [bundle-size-report.json](https://github.com/jigonzalez930209/velo-plot/blob/main/bundle-size-report.json).
api/plugin-sync.md: `PluginSync` is a deprecated stub — use `ChartGroup`. **Removed in v4.0.**
api/plugin-gpu.md: `PluginGpu` and chart `renderer: 'webgpu'` require an extended bundle entry and are **experimental**; WebGL2 remains the default production path.
api/analysis.md: FFT and filter utilities operate on in-memory arrays — very large signals should be windowed.
Use `velo-plot/scientific` or `velo-plot/plugins/analysis` — not included in core-only import.
api/plugin-forecasting.md: Unknown `method` strings throw — only documented methods (`sma`, `ema`, `wma`, `linear`, `expSmoothing`, `holt`, `holtWinters`, `arima`) are supported.
api/plugin-pattern-recognition.md: Built-in patterns are supported; **`custom` pattern** registration returns errors (accepted v3 gap).
api/plugin-ml-integration.md: Native simple NN/regression only — not a full ML framework integration (accepted v3 gap).
api/plugin-offscreen.md: Requires **OffscreenCanvas** support in the host browser (accepted v3 gap).
api/image-export.md: Stacked chart export is raster-only today; per-series SVG homolog is tracked in Stage 6.
Per-chart `exportSVG()` is unavailable on core-only imports; partial elsewhere — see [Stage 6 SVG parity](/roadmap/06-svg-vector-parity).
api/export.md: Vector export coverage varies by series type and bundle entry — see [Image & Vector Export](/api/image-export) and Stage 6 roadmap.
api/candlestick.md: Requires `velo-plot/trading`, `/scientific`, or `/full` — not available on core-only import.
Very large datasets (>100k bars) should use `PluginVirtualization` for stable frame times.
api/indicators.md: Heavy indicators can be offloaded to a Web Worker via `indicators-async` APIs when configured.
api/indicators-async.md: Worker path requires a bundler that resolves worker entry points; falls back to main thread when unavailable.
api/plugin-virtualization.md: `precision: 'full'` disables LOD decimation — use only when exact pixel fidelity is required.
api/plugin-latex.md: LaTeX labels require the LaTeX plugin and may impact render time on dense annotations.
api/plugin-analysis.md: FFT and filter utilities operate on in-memory arrays — very large signals should be windowed.
api/plugin-regression.md: Realtime fitting debounces updates; rapid series changes may skip intermediate fits.
api/plugin-drawing-tools.md: Drawings are stored in chart state — persist via serialization APIs if charts are recreated.
api/plugin-replay.md: Replay steps bar-by-bar; streaming datafeeds should pause live updates during replay.
api/trading-alerts.md: Alerts fire on rendered price updates — not a server-side order or notification system.
api/datafeed.md: `createMockDatafeed` is for demos; production apps should implement `DatafeedAdapter` with their backend.
api/react-velo-plot.md: React bindings wrap imperative chart APIs — prefer declarative props but call `chart.use()` for plugins not exposed as props.
Underlying bundle entry (`trading` / `scientific` / `full`) affects shipped JS size.
api/react-hook.md: Hooks mirror chart lifecycle — changing `container` after mount requires remounting the hook consumer.
api/plugins.md: Plugins marked **experimental** or **partial** in [PLUGIN-STATUS](/PLUGIN-STATUS) may change in minor releases until v4.
